title: Brand Identity Mascot Board AI
sourceTitle: Brand Identity Mascot Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Complete 18-section brand identity and mascot design sheet for MUYANG TEA, a tea shop, built around friendly rounded tea-cup mascot with leaf ears, warm smile, tiny arms, and polished collectible 3D form. Subject: friendly rounded tea-cup mascot with leaf ears, warm smile, tiny arms, and polished collectible 3D form is the original mascot hero; the sheet presents the mascot with logo exploration, icon language, anatomy notes, sketches, turnarounds, expressions, and pose studies. Layout Logic: Fixed 18-section clean design-board layout with clear module hierarchy, white presentation background, precise spacing, title area, logo block, palette swatches, icon set, audience chart, mood images, mascot anatomy, development sketches, turnaround views, expression set, and pose grid. Signature Elements: logo, color swatches, icon set, audience chart, mood photos, mascot anatomy, sketch exploration, turnarounds, expressions, and pose modules appear as organized board sections so the image reads like a complete mascot identity system rather than a single character poster. Style: Professional brand proposal board combining polished 3D mascot renders, clean vector-style logo studies, line-art development sketches, icon systems, and commercial identity presentation. Color Palette: Fresh tea-shop identity palette with soft leaf green, warm cream, muted tea brown, clean white, and small accent colors arranged as labeled swatches. Typography: Use MUYANG TEA Complete Brand Mascot System as the readable board title; keep labels short and clean for logo, color swatches, icon set, audience chart, mood photos, mascot anatomy, sketch exploration, turnarounds, expressions, and pose modules. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Color Palette: Fresh tea-shop identity palette with soft leaf green, warm cream, muted tea brown, clean white, and small accent colors arranged as labeled swatches. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
